items.name: Rusty Key
items.description: A key so corroded it might unlock a door or give you tetanus. Possibly both.

items.name: Glowing Mushroom
items.description: A bioluminescent fungus that pulses with an eerie blue light. Nutritional value: questionable. Aesthetic value: undeniable.

items.name: Sturdy Stick
items.description: A stick. Not just any stick -- this one has character. And splinters.

items.name: Makeshift Torch
items.description: A stick with a glowing mushroom wedged on top. It provides light and existential dread in equal measure.

items.name: Mysterious Bottle
items.description: A small glass bottle containing something that's either medicine, poison, or an ancient smoothie recipe. The label has long since decomposed.

items.name: Cave Crystal Shard
items.description: A small shard of crystal that hums with faint magical resonance. It is warm to the touch and deeply unimpressive.

items.name: Telescope Lens
items.description: A cracked but functional lens. It magnifies your view and your insecurities.

items.name: Town Notice
items.description: An official notice declaring the kingdom 'temporarily inconvenienced' by a petrification curse. Bureaucratic understatement at its finest.

items.name: Bridge Toll Coin
items.description: A coin so old the face on it has worn into a vague smudge. Still legal tender, apparently.
